impact_assessment.summary: Plan is fully implemented. All five volumetric generators exist, point cloud system is integrated, and all 35+ tests pass. No further architectural impact to evaluate — the work is done.

creates.impact: none — already created with all 5 shape generators (sphereVolume, shell, torusVolume, noiseLattice, spiralField)
none — 31 tests (T-040-01 through T-040-31) already in place

modifies.impact: none — already integrates generateVolumetricPoints with PRNG-driven shape selection, density scaling, lattice snapping, and angular variation
none — T-040-32 through T-040-35 integration tests already present

US-039.notes: Point cloud system, quality tiers, PRNG, scene bootstrap, and shader pipeline all exist from prior work

integration_surface.notes: Single new export (generateVolumetricPoints) consumed by one existing module (pointCloud.ts). No changes to GeometrySystem interface, render loop, mode manager, or main bootstrap. Integration is clean and contained.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.Base geometry occupies non-zero volume i: covered — all 5 generators produce volumetric output; stdDev assertions on all axes in tests
acceptance_criteria_coverage.Geometry is not constrained to a single: covered — cross-product coplanarity tests verify non-planar distribution
acceptance_criteria_coverage.Point positions are generated in 3D spac: covered — Float32Array of x,y,z triples fed into Three.js BufferGeometry position attribute
acceptance_criteria_coverage.Depth is visible through parallax when c: covered — volumetric positions rendered with perspective camera; verified by Z-spread test T-040-32

recommendation: APPROVE — no action needed. Plan is fully implemented with all acceptance criteria met, tests passing, and no architectural risk.
